executive_summary: 6 exception invoices processed. 2 invoices frozen for fraud (BEC signals detected — do not release payment). 1 high-priority early payment discount expiring in 8 days with 36.7% annualised ROI. 2 invoices auto-approved after PO amendment and vendor tolerance verification. 1 partial GRN approval — 75% payable now, remainder on full receipt.

signals: BANK_ACCOUNT_CHANGE: Bank account ****9999 does not match registered ****1234
EMAIL_DOMAIN_MISMATCH: Invoice from acme-supplies-corp.com, registered acmesupplies.com
fraud_frozen.action_required: Freeze payment. Contact vendor via registered phone number only. Do not use any contact details from this invoice. Escalate to AP Manager and Treasury.

signals: STRUCTURING: Amount $49,750 is within 0.5% of $50,000 approval threshold
ROUND_NUMBERS: All line items divisible by $500 or $1,000
NEW_VENDOR: First invoice from this vendor
RUSH_PAYMENT_TERMS: Net 7 terms vs industry standard Net 30
fraud_frozen.action_required: Freeze payment. Amount appears structured to avoid $50K approval threshold. Verify vendor legitimacy before any payment. Escalate to CFO.

auto_approved.approval_reason: Price variance of €195 vs PO €185 per unit covered by PO Amendment #AMD-2024-1002 dated 2024-11-20. Full GRN confirmed for all 20 units. 3-way match: PRICE_AMENDED → AUTO_APPROVED.
Price variance 1.5% (£252.75 vs £249.00). Within vendor-specific 3% tolerance policy for VND-003 negotiated 2024-01-15. Full GRN confirmed. AUTO_APPROVED per tolerance policy.

partial_approved.reason: GRN-2024-001 confirms 15 of 20 units received (75%). Approving confirmed portion $7,500. Holding $2,500 pending receipt of remaining 5 units. PO-2024-1001 remains open.

payment_priority_queue.recommendation: Pay by 2026-04-18 to capture SEK 2,340 discount. Annualised ROI 36.7% — exceeds cost of capital. Do not let this expire.
